description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a deep blue fabric, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The seat and backrest are both flat and rectangular, with the backrest divided into two equal sections, each adorned with three evenly spaced, fabric-covered buttons for a subtle tufted effect. The armrests are straight, low, and extend at a right angle from the seat, matching the overall geometric design. The sofa stands on four short, outward-angled wooden legs, which provide a slight elevation and a mid-century modern touch. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible seams or patterns aside from the button tufting. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A deep blue, modern three-seater sofa with button-tufted backrest, straight armrests, and angled wooden legs. The design is minimalist and geometric, with smooth upholstery and subtle detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, button-tufted backrest, straight armrests, and all four wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, low armrest, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the outward angle of the front and rear legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the sofa, the division between the two backrest sections, and the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the straight armrest and the sofa's depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, rectangular back cushions with button tufting; single, continuous seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests at each end, matching the height of the seat and featuring a boxy, rectangular profile with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four outward-angled, exposed wooden legs positioned at each corner; legs are short, tapered, and have a natural wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest divided into two equal sections, each with three button tufts; continuous and integrated with the sofa frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth texture and subtle button tufting on the backrest; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
